ideation: This sequence depicts a woman kneeling, emphasizing the posture of prayer or reverence. The arms will be positioned in a gesture of supplication or quiet contemplation. I'll use the examples to ensure smooth transitions and keep the movements fluid. Frame 1: Both arms are positioned in front of the body, hands clasped together as if in prayer. The arms gently curve downward, demonstrating a respectful posture. Frame 2: The right arm moves slightly outward and upward, as if to emphasize a point or add a gesture of supplication. The left arm remains largely still, providing contrast and balance. Frame 3: The right arm returns to its original position, maintaining the prayerful pose. The left arm now moves slightly outward and upward, providing a mirrored effect to the previous movement. Frame 4: Both arms gently curve downward to emphasize the prayerful pose once more. This creates a subtle, rhythmic movement that enhances the gesture's solemnity and quiet contemplation. Frame 5: The hands softly rest on the knees, the arms relaxed but maintaining a respectful posture. This represents the end of the gentle movement.

frames.beat: arms come together in front, hands clasped in prayer
right arm lifts slightly in supplication
left arm lifts, mirroring the right's gesture
both arms lower, deepening the prayerful pose
hands rest softly on knees, a moment of quiet reverence
